task_description: Implement choppy market filters for NeuroX v9: ATR filter (#1), Tick Consistency filter (#2), Signal Persistence (#3), and Dual-Mode system (#5). Skip session filter (#4). Bump version to 9.20.

verification.summary: All 91 tests pass (pytest tests/ -v --ignore=tests/test_tick_collector.py). Review finding addressed: tick consistency filter skipped for mean reversion entries in ranging markets (same as ATR filter). Implementation spans 9 files, 3 commits.
